name: Eminent Manali Tour Package
overview: Escape the routine and immerse yourself in the natural beauty of Manali with our Eminent Manali Tour. This 5-day trip from Chandigarh is designed for those who want to experience the best of Manali at a relaxed pace. From the ancient temples and vibrant local markets to the thrilling snow adventure activities at Solang Valley, every moment is curated for a premium experience. Traveling in a private cab ensures you have the freedom to enjoy the scenic drive through the Beas River corridor.
highlights: Manali is a paradise for couples and adventure enthusiasts alike.
Visit the ancient Hadimba Devi Temple and the peaceful Tibetan Monastery.
Solang Valley and Rohtang Pass offer breathtaking views of snow-clad peaks.
Kullu is famous for its shawl-making factories and river rafting.
Private taxi tour allows you to explore hidden gems at your own pace.

itinerary.title: Chandigarh to Manali (310 Km, 8-9 Hrs)
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Chandigarh airport or railway station, our driver will pick you up and take you to Manali via road. The drive to Manali is enchanting, with views of the green valleys and the Beas River. Along the way, you can stop at Sundernagar, Mandi, Pandoh Dam, and Kullu. Once you reach Manali, check into your hotel and freshen up. Spend the evening exploring the local markets. Dinner and overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Manali Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: After breakfast, head for a local tour of Manali. Visit the popular Hadimba Devi Temple, set amidst cedar forests. Explore the Vashisht Hot Springs and temple, known for its medicinal waters. Later, visit the Tibetan Monastery and spend time at the vibrant Mall Road. Return to your hotel for dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Manali to Solang Valley and Rohtang Pass
itinerary.description: Today, visit the two most popular tourist spots - Solang Valley and Rohtang Pass (subject to permit). Rohtang Pass offers unmatched views of the snow-clad Himalayas. At Solang Valley, try adventure activities like skiing, paragliding, and snow scooter rides. Enjoy the scenic beauty of the glaciers. Return to your hotel in the evening for dinner.

itinerary.title: Manali to Kullu and Naggar Excursion
itinerary.description: After breakfast, drive to Kullu Valley. Visit a shawl factory to see how traditional shawls are woven. You can also visit the historic Naggar Castle and the Roerich Art Gallery. Enjoy the panoramic views of the Kullu Valley. Spend the rest of the day at your leisure. Dinner and overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Manali to Chandigarh Drop (310 Km, 8-9 Hrs)
itinerary.description: On the final day of your tour, have your breakfast and check out from the hotel. Our driver will take you back to Chandigarh and drop you at the airport or railway station for your onward journey. Cherish the memories of your eminent Manali tour.

inclusions: All toll taxes, parking fees and driver's allowance.
exclusions: Charges for early Check-In & late Check-Out at Hotel.

faqs.question: Is Atal Tunnel visit included?
faqs.answer: Atal Tunnel can be added to your Solang Valley trip for a small additional cost depending on weather and road conditions.

faqs.question: Are the hotels child-friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our partner resorts in the Eminent category offer family rooms and kid-friendly amenities.

seo.title: Eminent Manali Tour Package From Chandigarh | Guru Kripa Travels
seo.description: Book our 4 nights 5 days Eminent Manali tour package from Chandigarh. Enjoy luxury stays, private sightseeing, and snow adventures in Manali.
